content.full_text:
KAISER PERMANENTE

Executive Offices, Ordway Building

January 8, 1992


Ms. Mary Anne Kevasager
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Dear Mary Anne:

Re: Form 635 Report of Lobbyist Employer

Thank you for your help with my telephone inquiry about whether the
amounts entered in Sections A-D in the above form should be the
"incurred" or the "paid" amounts. You informed me that it was acceptable
to use either method, if done so consistently.

In our past returns we had been using the "paid" method, which involved
very lengthy analysis of invoices and determining the payment dates of
all invoices. Following our telephone conversation, we have now decided
to use the incurred method consistently in all of our future quarterly
returns.

For our records, I would very much appreciate it if you would kindly
acknowledge the receipt of this letter by signing the attached copy and
return it at your earliest convenience to:

Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc.
Attention: Satish Doshi (OB 21)
One Kaiser Plaza
Oakland, California 94612

Thank you.

Very truly yours,

Satish Doshi
Accountant

enc.

SD/sms
1233a:4

Kaiser Foundation Health Plan, Inc.
One Kaiser Plaza Oakland, California 94612 415-271-5910

[illegible]

WACOUSTA HEREINAFTER

[illegible]

[The majority of this document is too faint/illegible to transcribe with confidence. Only the header text at the top is partially visible.]
